text: I was convinced these like Ohio hills were the only skiing to be done here.

It looks like November in Pennsylvania.

What it really means to ski in these kind of conditions, forget the skiing, it's like
you finish skiing and you have this long trail, and when you put your shoes on, you put your

The most fun thing about Romania has just been the adventure.
You just have to embrace it.
